title: 菊花賞の後に・顔は下げずに！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've achieved my goal... but Sei was just too good!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right. There's no time to feel sorry for
myself!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely winning my next race... the spring
Tenno Sho! I'll show you!
